items.summary: Add a step-by-step Tutorial Mode to the F-19 Flight Simulator that walks players through each core mechanic in sequence: basic movement (W/A/S/D or equivalent), throttle control, shooting enemies, locking on with targeting, dodging incoming missiles, and deploying flares as countermeasures. Each step should display a clear on-screen prompt/overlay describing the action required and only advance to the next step once the player successfully performs it.

Implement four new enemy types in the F-19 Flight Simulator, each with distinct behavior and visual appearance: (1) Fast Jets — high-speed aircraft that are difficult to track and require lead-aiming; (2) Armored Enemies — enemies that require multiple hits to destroy, with a visible health bar showing remaining HP; (3) Missile-Launching Drones — enemies that fire homing missiles at the player, requiring flare countermeasures to evade; (4) Ground-to-Air Turrets — static ground-based enemies that fire rapid projectiles at low-altitude aircraft. Each type should have a distinct 3D geometry/appearance and award different coin/score values on destruction.

Add a Progressive Levels system to the F-19 Flight Simulator with at least 6 levels of escalating difficulty. Each level should combine multiple win conditions chosen from: survive for X seconds, destroy X enemies, reach a score threshold, and protect an objective (e.g., a carrier or ground base). Difficulty should escalate across levels by increasing enemy count, enemy speed, missile frequency, and introducing new enemy types from REQ-2 at later levels. Each level should display its objectives clearly at the start and track progress in the HUD during play. A level-complete screen should show results and allow progression to the next level.

Add a Level Select / Mode Select screen to the F-19 Flight Simulator that lets players choose between Tutorial Mode (REQ-1) and Progressive Levels (REQ-3). The screen should show each level's name, difficulty rating, and locked/unlocked status. Completed levels should display the player's best score.
